result.finding: validation/structural_adequacy_fit.py, driven by the MECHANISTIC ORYZA2000 biomass (oryza_growth) + measured Q_TP (forcing_rice) -- NOT the logistic placeholder. CONSTRAINED (DOF>0) fits vs Yamazaki: A f_xy+global L_Ph+global kappa_d (DOF 20): root 0.45 straw 0.18 grain 0.52 overall 0.41; B +per-cong L_Ph (DOF 10): grain 0.36 overall 0.35; C +per-cong kappa_d (DOF 10): root 0.26 straw 0.16 grain 0.51 overall 0.34. => structure reproduces SHOOT translocation (straw ~0.16-0.18, i.e. within ~1.5x) under a constrained fit; root needs per-congener kappa_d (->0.26); grain improves with per-congener L_Ph (->0.36) but keeps a long-chain residual floor. Whole plant within ~factor 2.2 (overall 0.34) at DOF 10 -- vs saturated W2 0.029 (DOF 0) and a-priori 0.84.
